query.description: Case-insensitive search across id, type, text, originalText, frame name, link, and file id.

types.description: Element types to include, e.g. text, rectangle, ellipse, diamond, line, arrow, freedraw, image, frame.

selected_only.description: Return only the user's currently selected elements.

frame_id.description: Return elements inside a specific frame.

group_id.description: Return elements in a specific group.

offset.description: Zero-based offset into the filtered result set. Defaults to 0.

limit.description: Maximum elements to return. Defaults to 60, hard-capped at 120. Use pagination for more.

include_files.description: Include resource file metadata. Defaults to false.

include_deleted.description: Include deleted elements. Defaults to false.

max_points.description: Maximum points per linear/freeDraw element. Defaults to 20.
